task_completion.description: The order_lines dataset is loaded into Oracle Analytics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open, and 'order_lines' is visible in the Data panel on the left side of the screen.

task_completion.description: A canvas named 'Shipping Overview' is created analyzing Shipping Cost by Ship Mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A canvas tab at the bottom is named 'Shipping Overview'. The main visualization area shows a chart or table containing 'Ship Mode' and 'Shipping Cost'.

task_completion.description: A calculated column named 'Shipping_Ratio' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A data element named 'Shipping_Ratio' is visible in the Data panel (often under 'My Calculations'), or the calculation editor is open showing the name 'Shipping_Ratio' and the formula involving Shipping Cost and Sales.

task_completion.description: A canvas named 'Mode Efficiency Matrix' is created analyzing Shipping Cost by Ship Mode and Customer Segment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A canvas tab at the bottom is named 'Mode Efficiency Matrix'. The visualization shows data broken down by both 'Ship Mode' and 'Segment' (or Customer Segment), including 'Shipping Cost'.

task_completion.description: A canvas named 'Profitability by Mode' is created analyzing Profit and Shipping_Ratio by Ship Mode.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A canvas tab at the bottom is named 'Profitability by Mode'. The visualization includes 'Ship Mode', 'Profit', and the custom 'Shipping_Ratio' metric.
The top title bar or header of the Oracle Analytics application displays the name 'shipping_optimization', or a 'Save As' dialog is visible saving the file to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to build the workbook.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface being actively used (drag and drop, menu navigation), rather than a terminal window or text editor.

integrity.description: The canvases display actual rendered data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The charts or tables in the canvases show actual data points, bars, or numbers, indicating the dataset was properly connected and queried, not just empty visualization shells.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts to generate the .dva archive directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no Python, PowerShell, or bash scripts visible in the screenshots that are designed to programmatically construct and zip a .dva file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an Oracle Analytics workbook with three specific canvases: 'Shipping Overview', 'Mode Efficiency Matrix', and 'Profitability by Mode'. A custom calculation named 'Shipping_Ratio' (Shipping Cost / Sales) must be created and used. The final file must be named 'shipping_optimization' and saved in the Documents folder.
